callGraph.callee:
data.tickets.map((ticket, index) => { const formattedDate = new Date(ticket.expiryDate).toLocaleDateString("sr-RS", { year: "numeric", month: "long", day: "numeric", }); const usageText = ticket.usageLimit > 10 ? "Sezonska karta (Neograničeno)" : `Maksimalan broj ulazaka: ${ticket.usageLimit}`; return `
Karta #${index + 1}

${ticket.title}

${usageText}

Važi do: ${formattedDate}
`; }).join
